member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web9.Core.Managers.SingularityAggregationManager
member.summary: WEB9, made literal: every layer below it (WEB4 OASIS API/ONODE, WEB5 STAR API, WEB6 AI abstraction, WEB7 Symbiotic, WEB8 Inter-Galactic mesh) is polled via real HTTP, and the result is folded into one unified status report - "the network becomes aware that it IS the universe" implemented honestly as cross-service health aggregation and live metric collection, not fabricated metaphysics.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web9.Core.Managers.SingularityAggregationManager.LayerBaseUrls
member.summary: The base URL for each layer this aggregator probes, resolved from environment variables with sensible defaults.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web9.Core.Managers.SingularityAggregationManager.GetUnifiedStatusAsync
member.summary: Probes every registered layer in parallel and folds the results into one unified report.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web9.Core.Managers.SingularityAggregationManager.CollectLayerMetricsAsync(System.String,System.String,NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web9.Core.Models.LayerStatus)
member.summary: Pulls a few cheap, real metrics from layers that expose a public listing endpoint - skipped silently if unavailable.

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web9.Core.Models.LayerStatus
member.summary: The live, real-time status of a single OASIS layer (WEB4-WEB8), as observed by an actual HTTP probe.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web9.Core.Models.LayerStatus.Metrics
member.summary: Cheap, real metrics pulled from the layer's own endpoints where available, e.g. "registeredAgents": "3".

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web9.Core.Models.UnifiedStatusReport
member.summary: The aggregate, unified view across every probed layer - "the network observing itself".
